title: Looking for Financial Analyst at SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Looking for Financial Analyst at SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Chennai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises:
SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises!
